member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IApprovalProvider
member.summary: Interface for approval providers. Implement this in your host application to integrate with your approval workflows (e.g., web UI, API, or service).

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IApprovalProvider.RequestApprovalAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests approval for an action in the given execution context.
member.param: Optional metadata for the approval request.
member.returns: Approval result with status and details.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.ApprovalResult.ApproverId
member.summary: ID of the approver (e.g., user ID, system ID).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationHandler
member.summary: Interface for escalation handlers. Implement this in your host application to handle escalations (e.g., high-risk actions, policy violations).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult.HandlerId
member.summary: ID of the handler (e.g., for auditing).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationResult.Metadata
member.summary: Additional metadata (e.g., approval or override details).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService
member.summary: High-level service for managing escalations, approvals, and overrides. Implement this in your host application to coordinate between providers.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService.RequestOverrideAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests an override for an action.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IOverrideProvider
member.summary: Interface for override providers. Implement this in your host application to allow manual overrides of actions or parameters.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IOverrideProvider.OverrideAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests an override for an action in the given execution context.
member.param: Optional new parameters for the action.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.OverrideResult.OverrideId
member.summary: ID of the override (e.g., for auditing).

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.DependencyInjection.EscalationServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for registering escalation services in DI. The host application MUST provide implementations for these interfaces.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.DependencyInjection.EscalationServiceCollectionExtensions.AddEscalationInterfaces(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the escalation service interfaces. The host application must provide concrete implementations.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.DependencyInjection.DefaultEscalationService
member.summary: Default implementation of IEscalationService that coordinates between IApprovalProvider, IOverrideProvider, and IEscalationHandler.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for escalation in execution contexts.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.SetEscalationService(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.IEscalationService)
member.summary: Sets the escalation service for the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.GetEscalationService(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext)
member.summary: Gets the escalation service from the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.RequestApprovalAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests approval for an action in the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.RequestOverrideAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests an override for an action in the context.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.Escalation.Extensions.EscalationExtensions.EscalateAsync(Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IExecutionContext,Valaiorp.Escalation.Contracts.EscalationReason,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles an escalation in the context.
